Description: MQ Error: MQRC 2058 - Queue Manager Name Not Valid
Solution:
Double-check the exact name from your MQSC DIS QMGR(*) or DIS CHL(*) QMNAME output Stack Overflow.

Ensure it matches exactly (including case) and is not truncated.
Clear the queues and then the issue will be solved

Description: ORA-01034: The Oracle instance is not available to use
Solution: Validate the oracle instance id is correct. If so, the restart the instance and connect again

Description: ORA-1254: Service name is not registerd with listner_host port
Solution: The listner could have dynamically did not get resolved. This may be temporary.But starg the database to get the listner resolved

Description: telnet: Unable to connect to remote host: Connection refused
Solution: Check if telnet is installed first. If it is then do the ping test to validate the IP address
Try to ping the exsist in server where the mount point installed. If not, reboot the mount point
